title: In-app URL router for deep links
description: Implement onOpenURL handling in AggregatorApp.swift (or a dedicated router struct). Parse aggregator://article/{id} → navigate to ArticleDetailView; parse aggregator://thread/{id} → navigate to ThreadDetailView. Navigation must be cold-start-safe: store the pending deep-link URL on parse, then apply the navigation path once the root NavigationStack's views are ready. Silently ignore malformed or unrecognized URLs.
acceptance_criteria: onOpenURL parses aggregator://article/{id} and pushes ArticleDetailView with the given id
onOpenURL parses aggregator://thread/{id} and pushes ThreadDetailView with the given id
Routing works from cold start (app launched via widget tap, not running beforehand)
Malformed URLs and unknown schemes are silently ignored with no crash
